name: Cescent Harbor Park
description: Come play pickleball at Cescent Harbor Park in Sitka, AK! There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free. You can’t reserve the court.

name: The Hames Center
description: Come play pickleball at The Hames Center in Sitka, AK! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.
